prompt:
A neatly arranged 8 AWG fused cable kit on a bench: red and black leads with crimped ring terminals, an inline MIDI-style fuse holder, and a torque wrench socket nearby. The cables are coiled cleanly with heat-shrink details visible; no printed markings or labels are readable.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future maker/workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean surfaces, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Compose so the fuse holder and thick ring terminals are clearly identifiable at icon scale.
